svg.text: Current behavior as implemented: normalize protocol request -> NormalizedRequest, then denormalize back into each protocol-specific request.
All three protocol adapters converge on the same in-memory request model before protocol-specific denormalization.
requests.ts also reads/writes message.isError for Anthropic tool_result
messages, but shared.ts does not declare that field on NormalizedMessage.
content string or content[].text joined with "\n" -> one text part
message.refusal also appends one refusal part
tool_call_id -> toolCallId; content must normalize into text parts
tool_choice string auto|none|required -> same semantic type
Hard fail if these fields are present
audio, frequency_penalty, logit_bias, logprobs, modalities, n, prediction,
request.instructions -> prepended messages (developer or parsed items)
input is string -> one user message with one text part
call_id -> toolCallId; output -> text parts only
tool_choice string auto|none|required -> same semantic type
Hard fail if these fields are present
request.metadata ? { user_id: request.metadata.user_id ?? null } : null -> metadata
system string -> system message with one text part
system[] blocks -> system message with text parts
tool_use | server_tool_use -> toolCalls += function(id, name, JSON.stringify(input))
tool_result -> tool message { toolCallId, isError, parts }
tool_result content supports text / image / document only
tool without input_schema -> fail (server tools unsupported)
tool.type="custom" -> normalized custom tool; otherwise function tool
Hard fail if these fields are present
These are the important asymmetries when converting NormalizedRequest back into protocol-specific request objects.
user parts only support text, image_url, input_audio
assistant content only emits text/refusal parts
thinking/redacted_thinking are not representable in Chat content
leading system/developer messages are pulled into instructions
joined with "\n"; remaining messages go to input[]
assistant thinking/redacted_thinking become separate reasoning items
assistant then emits one message item for non-thinking parts
tool/function result messages always emit function_call_output
normalized tool-result role does not preserve function/custom output kind
documents map to input_file; image/audio map to input_image/input_audio
system + developer messages are removed from messages[] and merged into system[]
adjacent same-role messages are merged by mergeAnthropicMessages()
custom tool or custom toolChoice causes fail on denormalize
input_audio is unsupported for user/tool_result parts
tool/function result messages become user.content[{ type: "tool_result", ... }]
